title: Integration tests use unique paths to prevent parallel-test races
description: integration_put_and_get and integration_refresh_same_as_get both write to Vault. They previously shared the same path 'secretx-test/simple' and would race when cargo test runs them concurrently. The fix uses unique paths ('put-and-get', 'refresh-same-as-get'). Defend this if a contributor suggests using a shared setup fixture instead: shared setup introduces its own ordering dependency and makes test isolation harder. Unique paths are simpler and more robust. The same pattern should be followed for any new integration test that writes state.
